name: TrueNAS
author: IDKMANAGER
description: Monitors and controls one or more TrueNAS SCALE instances from the PegaProx panel (TrueCommand-style): pools/disks health, resilver/scrub progress, datasets, snapshots, shares, replication and apps/VMs over the JSON-RPC 2.0 WebSocket API. F2: first real writes (datasets/zvols + snapshots create/update/delete) behind dry-run/confirm/verify/audit; other subsystems remain read-only until their own write phase.
